sections.paragraph:
πλόκαμος, ου, ὁ (πλέκω; Hom. et al.; also Tat. 10, 1 ὁ Βερενίκης πλόκαμος) braid/lock of hair predom. of women (so in pl. since Il. 14, 176; also 3 Macc 1:4) ApcPt 9:24.—DELG s.v. πλέκω.

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Tat Tat , II a.d.—List 5

predom. predom. = predominant(ly)

  1. pl. = plural

Il. Il. = Iliad, s. Hom.—List 5

ApcPt ApcPt = Apocalypse of Peter—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 831
